name: Taiwan Sakura Corporation
summary: Taiwan Sakura Corporation manufactures and trades in kitchen appliances in Taiwan and internationally. The company offers gas cookers, water heaters and filters, furniture, dish dryers, building materials, metal hardware parts, sports equipment, electric hand tools, range hoods, sanitary equipment, and bathroom products, as well as cabinet of kitchen systems. It also leases real estate properties, as well as trades in various kitchen electrical appliances. The company sells its products through distributors and sales offices. Taiwan Sakura Corporation was founded in 1978 and is headquartered in Taichung City, Taiwan.
